items.title: Hierarchical Analog and Mixed-Signal Circuit Placement Considering System Signal Flow.
items.abstract: Placement is a critical step in layout automation for analog and mixed-signal (AMS)-integrated circuits (ICs). It determines the proximity of devices and influences the wiring topology, significantly impacting post-routing parasitics and coupling capacitance. Existing analog placement techniques mainly focus on geometric constraints in analog building blocks. However, there yet lacks an effective way to consider the system-level signal flow for sensitive AMS circuits. Leveraging prior knowledge from schematics, we propose considering the critical signal paths in automatic AMS placement. A multilevel analog layout automation flow is further developed to reduce manual efforts in synthesizing hierarchical AMS circuits. Experimental results demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of our proposed framework with a 22.8% reduction in routed wirelength compared to state-of-the-art AMS placer and a 10-dB improvement in the signal-to-noise-and-distortion ratio (SNDR) for an ADC.
items.abstract_zh: 布局是模拟和混合信号 (AMS) 集成电路 (IC) 布局自动化的关键步骤。它决定设备的接近度并影响布线拓扑，显着影响布线后寄生和耦合电容。现有的模拟布局技术主要关注模拟构建块中的几何约束。然而，目前还缺乏一种有效的方法来考虑敏感 AMS 电路的系统级信号流。利用原理图中的先验知识，我们建议考虑自动 AMS 布局中的关键信号路径。进一步开发了多级模拟布局自动化流程，以减少合成分层 AMS 电路的手动工作。实验结果证明了我们提出的框架的效率和有效性，与最先进的 AMS 布局器相比，布线长度减少了 22.8%，ADC 的信噪比和失真比 (SNDR) 提高了 10 dB。

items.title: Pipette: Efficient Fine-Grained Reads for SSDs.
items.abstract: Big data applications, such as recommendation system and social network, often generate a huge number of fine-grained reads to the storage. Block-oriented storage devices upon the traditional storage system rely on the paging mechanism to migrate pages to the host DRAM, tending to suffer from these fine-grained read operations in terms of I/O traffic as well as performance. Motivated by this challenge, an efficient fine-grained read framework, Pipette, is proposed in this article as an extension to the traditional I/O framework. With adaptive design for caching, merging, and scheduling, Pipette explores locality and acceleration for fine-grained read requests to establish an efficient byte-granular read path upon the dedicated byte-addressable interface. When the Pipette prototype on an SSD runs popular workloads, we measured throughput gains by up to 50% and 54% with traffic reduction in the range of <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$41.3\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> and <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$56.5\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> .
items.abstract_zh: 大数据应用程序，例如推荐系统和社交网络，通常会对存储产生大量细粒度的读取。传统存储系统上的面向块的存储设备依靠分页机制将页面迁移到主机 DRAM，在 I/O 流量和性能方面往往会受到这些细粒度读取操作的影响。受这一挑战的推动，本文提出了一种高效的细粒度读取框架 Pipette，作为传统 I/O 框架的扩展。通过缓存、合并和调度的自适应设计，Pipette 探索细粒度读取请求的局部性和加速，以在专用字节可寻址接口上建立高效的字节粒度读取路径。当 SSD 上的 Pipette 原型运行常见工作负载时，我们测量到吞吐量提高了 50% 和 54%，流量减少范围为 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$41.3\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 和 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$56.5\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 。

items.title: Development and Efficiency Analysis of a Switching Scheme for INL Reduction in Unary DACs.
items.abstract: This brief is devoted to the development of a switching scheme for unary digital-to-analog converters (DACs). Switching schemes are one of the possible solutions to compensate the influence of the component value deviations appearing during integrated circuit production. Previously known deterministic switching schemes have some weak points, which limit the compensation with resolution growth. In order to overcome such drawbacks, this work adapts the properties revealed and employed in switching schemes, where each element is split into several parts. Based on these properties, the novel hierarchical chessboard flip (HCF) switching scheme is proposed. The simulation demonstrated that HCF reduces the integral nonlinearity (INL) better than previously known solutions while being scalable to any even bit number in DAC array. Adoption to odd resolutions is also possible. Additionally, an extension of the commonly used simulation approach is introduced. Obtaining a dependence of INL reduction on the rotation angle of the error profile may reveal a weakness of some switching scheme in spite of competitive average values.
items.abstract_zh: 本简介致力于开发一元数模转换器 (DAC) 的开关方案。开关方案是补偿集成电路生产过程中出现的元件值偏差影响的可能解决方案之一。先前已知的确定性切换方案有一些弱点，这限制了分辨率增长的补偿。为了克服这些缺点，这项工作采用了切换方案中揭示和采用的属性，其中每个元件被分成几个部分。基于这些特性，提出了新颖的分层棋盘翻转（HCF）切换方案。仿真表明，HCF 比以前已知的解决方案更好地降低了积分非线性 (INL)，同时可扩展到 DAC 阵列中的任何偶数位数。也可以采用奇数分辨率。此外，还介绍了常用模拟方法的扩展。尽管具有竞争性平均值，但获得 INL 减小对误差曲线旋转角度的依赖关系可能会揭示某些切换方案的弱点。

items.title: ELight: Toward Efficient and Aging-Resilient Photonic In-Memory Neurocomputing.
items.abstract: Optical phase change material (PCM) has emerged promising to enable photonic in-memory neurocomputing in optical neural network (ONN) designs. However, massive photonic tensor core (PTC) reuse is required to implement large matrix multiplication due to the limited single-core scale. The resultant large number of PCM writes during inference incurs serious dynamic energy costs and overwhelms the fragile PCM with limited write endurance, causing the severe aging issue. Moreover, the aged PCM would distort the stored value and significantly degrade the reliability of PTC. In this work, we propose a holistic solution, <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">ELight</monospace> , to tackle both the aging issue and the post-aging reliability issue, where a proactive aging-aware optimization framework minimizes the overall PCM write cost and a post-aging tolerance scheme overcomes the effect of aged PCM. Specifically, in the aging-aware optimization part, we propose write-aware training to encourage the similarity among weight blocks and combine it with a post-training optimization technique to reduce programming efforts by eliminating redundant writes. Next, an efficient groupwise row-based weight-PTC remapping scheme is introduced to tolerate the reprogrammability degradation due to the aged PCM. Experiments show that <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">ELight</monospace> can achieve over <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$20 \times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> reductions in the total number of write operations and dynamic energy cost with comparable accuracy. Moreover, <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">ELight</monospace> can guarantee significant accuracy recovery under the aged PCM within photonic memories. With our <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">ELight</monospace> , photonic in-memory neurocomputing will step forward toward practical applications in machine learning with order-of-magnitude longer lifetime, lower programming energy cost, and significant resilience against PCM aging effects.
items.abstract_zh: 光学相变材料 (PCM) 有望在光学神经网络 (ONN) 设计中实现光子内存神经计算。然而，由于单核规模有限，需要大量光子张量核（PTC）复用来实现大型矩阵乘法。推理过程中产生的大量 PCM 写入会导致严重的动态能源成本，并压垮写入耐久性有限的脆弱 PCM，导致严重的老化问题。此外，老化的PCM会扭曲存储值并显着降低PTC的可靠性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个整体解决方案 <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">ELight</monospace> 来解决老化问题和老化后可靠性问题，其中主动老化感知优化框架最大限度地降低了整体 PCM 写入成本，而老化后容差方案克服了这一影响老化的 PCM。具体来说，在老化感知优化部分，我们提出写感知训练来鼓励权重块之间的相似性，并将其与训练后优化技术相结合，通过消除冗余写入来减少编程工作。接下来，引入了一种有效的基于分组行的权重-PTC 重映射方案，以容忍由于老化的 PCM 导致的可重编程性下降。实验表明 <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">ELight</monospace> 可以实现超过 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$20 \times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 写入操作总数和动态能源成本减少，且精度相当。此外，<monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">ELight</monospace> 可以保证光子存储器中老化的 PCM 下的显着精度恢复。借助我们的 <monospace xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">ELight</monospace>，光子内存神经计算将朝着机器学习的实际应用迈进，并具有数量级的更长寿命、更低的编程能源成本以及对 PCM 老化效应的显着恢复能力。
